_readme: Each entry describes one captured screenshot used for offline OCR regression tests.

_fields.note: Human-readable description of what is visible in the screenshot
_fields.expected_ocr: Exact digit string the OCR should read (e.g. '12345'). Leave empty to skip OCR assertion.
_fields.expected_lookup: Substring that must appear in the lookup result (e.g. 'Quantainium'). Leave empty to skip lookup assertion.
